title: Sagwaan
overview: In rural Rajasthan, a crime investigation exposes how black magic and superstition are weaponised to manipulate and exploit the vulnerable. As the case unfolds, the truth behind the so-called supernatural reveals a dangerous nexus of fear, fraud, and human greed.
